reviews.review_description: Actually a really fun destruction derby game. The football map is the most chaotic. I wish I could set more laps for the races, make the bots even easier, and play in mixed reality.

Game is good but when I am trying play multiplayer with friends the game Just drop down..

In single plyer mod its ok

￼If you like games like RC Pro AM from back on the NES, Rocket League, or even Mario Kart like weapons to keep your opponents at bay, and can see yourself enjoying a top down￼ racer, I do believe you may fall in love with this game. Totally worth the purchase for both single player, and multiplayer alike. 

Updated 12/18/25: I appreciate the devs releasing the update today that fixed a warping issue that was on the Quest 3 that made me rewrite my entire review. 
In my previous review, I said how much I loved the game, but the warping issue on the Quest 3 made it difficult to get to work right unless you did some trickery. Now the game is running as it should. 

Cheers to the Devs.
This game is just a good arcade game. Fun to play, looks nice and sounds good. Only an update to the antialiasing would be nice ;)

reviews.review_title: Just tested and is now WORKING 12/19/25!
reviews.review_description: Dev's have finally come through and fixed the game! LET'S GOOOOO! My family is hopping on tonight baby! Tested on Meta Quest 3, and I don't anticipate issue with my sibling being able to launch on his Quest 2. Thank you much dev's, you just made our Christmas 10X better!!! 🎄🎅❄

yeah this has stopped working on the quest 3 now. it's been awhile. I was just waiting to see if it would correct itself but still broken and it's too bad cuz this is one of the games I play the most. hopefully they fix it someday.

developer_response.body: Hi. We have uploaded a patch with fixes. Try updating

reviews.review_description: Game is working now, though it still crashed once on me so its not 100% perfect. But fun game
I absolutely love this game!  Unfortunately, since the Meta Quest software update 81.1034, the game won’t run anymore. I’m literally having withdrawal symptoms please fix it soon, I need my dose! 🥲
The developers have made the effort to fix the game, it now works on MetaQuest 3 in OS 83.
Best game ever to play with friends
Hello since the new update of horizon, its impossible to launch the game !

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We will try to fix the problem as soon as possible.

reviews.review_description:
Won’t work on Quest 3

12/18
Patched!

reviews.review_title: Awesome game, great fun! Fail since v81
reviews.review_description: Please developers, fix it ASAP!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback. We are working to fix the issue.

reviews.review_description:
BlazeRush: Star Track delivers high-speed arcade racing with lots of weapons and frantic multiplayer fun. With 30 missions, dozens of vehicles and fast gameplay, it’s a solid choice for VR racing fans.
A must have!
Great racing game ! Must buy.
Give it a try for yourself and you will agree.

The controls take a little getting used to, but once you get the hang of it, the game’s a little gem. Takes me back to the days of Rock ‘n’ Roll Racing and Death Rally. The fact that I got it on sale is an added bonus, but I would have been happy with it at full price.

A fun racing title!
Works just fine with Quest 3!

Highly recommend!
What a fantastic VR racer and a joy to play.

Weird head tracking warping/distortion. Until fixed it doesn't deserve Quest 4 compatible notice.

Please fix a asap

Otherwise fun game.

Update: 6 months since posting, devs promise fix and still nothing done about it. Dropped to 1 star

developer_response.body: Hi. We have uploaded a patch with fixes. Try updating

reviews.review_description:
Because of the StarTrack boss is really really hard to beat.  I tried a hundred time and did scratch his paint a few times but that is it.  SO i am pretty pissed.  

Had it on the Oculus Go, then on the Quest 2. Great game EXCEPT the last Boss

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. The final boss should be difficult

reviews.review_description:
Yeah, the graphics are not the best available on Quest and perhaps the port would have benefited from some additional care, but this is just so much fun, especially in multiplayer with friends. I don't think every VR game should implement the first person view, in fact the VR effect here is simple but super effective and makes the game so comfortable.
If you like some straightforward old school multiplayer arcade racing game this is the best option in my opinion.

P.S. Devs please consider to release it in the Oculus PC store too with crossplatform play, we played it among friends for months and now the ones with the Rift are cut off with this new version.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We will discuss your request with the developers

reviews.review_description: If this game gets even more content and if multiplayer becomes popular then this is a great hit VR game  good job dev team

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We hope that the game will become popular

reviews.review_description: It was very addicting at the start and I couldn’t take my hands of but after the 25 race in the campaign I just realised it was the same old race just different viechles or slightly different map. Also the multiplayer aspect is horrible with not even being able to play with anyone half the time. If you do have the money I’d say get it just because it is worth it’s price point but you will probably get bored that’s my take on this game tho thanks for reading.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback.

reviews.review_description: I want to give this game a good rating but can't in good conscience. This is the most frustrating 😤 gameplay ever due to the lack of basic racing control design. The game is beautiful with crisp graphics but that can only get you so far. I mean really though, who tested 🤔 this and said.. yea this is perfect or did they say , I don't care it's good enough  ?

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. Can you write to us what exactly you didn't like about the controls?

reviews.review_description:
Was excited to try this out on my Quest 3 after loving this game on my Quest 2, but almost immediately after loading the game, the title screen warps when you turn your head left/right and then in game the entire track warps. 

The visuals do not have ANY of the same feel and the immersion is broken when playing on the Quest 3 as a result of the warping. 

One star because that’s how painful this is. Cmon devs. This is such a great game and is now ruined for a new group of VR players. 

Sure, updated graphics could help, but fix the warping issue, etc on Quest 3.

developer_response.body: Hi. We have uploaded a patch with fixes. Try updating

reviews.review_description: MY LEVEL OF EXCITEMENT AND FUN PLAYING THIS GAME NEEDS ALL CAPS!! GREAT GAME! LOOKING FORWARD TO TRYING MULTIPLAYER!!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback and thanks for the emotions

reviews.review_description: I'm loving this game but I wish I could play it with my Xbox controller cause my hands are exhausted from steering with the Oculus controller.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the idea. We will discuss it in the team

reviews.review_description:
Been playing this online with a friend and having so much fun.
Its like micro machines but I find it more playable.
Graphics are very average but dont let that put you off an otherwise fun game.

reviews.review_title: RC Pro Am / Twisted metal vibes!!!!
reviews.review_description: I love this game. I love everything about it. I am telling you get this now if you love NES's RC Pro AM or Twisted Metal! Theres a review from May complaining about camera angles and yeah still can be fixed a little. Thats my only gripe! My favorite game mode is playing with friends in the football arena. King of the Hill races are fun and engaging. The computer algorithms for other racers in adventure mode is phenomenal, you cannot predict their next move just like real players. Id love to be added as a beta tester for future versions!!!!!!!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We are very glad that you like our game

reviews.review_description: It works fine on my quest 3. I just wish there was an update to match the resolution of the quest, its kind like the Netflix app that only plays movies in 480p

Takes me back to my megadrive days playing micro machines. Great gameplay and style. Been playing non stop since I bought this. Great to jump in and have a quick match. Only issue is that I've not yet been able to play anyone online. No one ever seems to be there. Hopefully more people will pick this game up.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback. We also hope that there will be a lot of players

reviews.review_description: Great, get it need more people to play online

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback!

reviews.review_description: There are lots of times where firing the missile totally whites out the screen completely.  Really annoying and is more often than not, the reason i exit the game.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback. We will look at the problem

reviews.review_description:
Mine works ok on Quest 3 
Nice little game

developer_response.body: Thank you for Hi. We have uploaded a patch with fixes. Try updatingyour feedback. We know about the problem and will try to solve it

reviews.review_title: A VERY nostalgic  game and EXTREMELY fun
reviews.review_description: One of my fav games for SNES was "Rock N Roll racing" where you get to upgrade your vehicle after ever race...tires, engine, weapons, armor, etc. I've missed that game so much, and this game brings just about everything I loved in Rock N Roll racing. The perspective is AMAZING, the amount to content to unlock, vehicle types, characters, weapons, stages, challenges, and graphics and effects are just incredible. I havent played multi-player just yet, but its there and I can't wait.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. Have a nice game

reviews.review_description: Why can’t i find an open server ? I want to play with real people not just bot.

developer_response.body: In our game, the servers are made by the players themselves

reviews.review_description:
9.6.22
This game reminds me of a futuristic RC Pro AM. Very nostalgic to them good ole Nintendo days. Needless to say, I played it for a couple hours my  first day of purchase (9.5.22). Had me smiling from ear to ear. Can’t wait to get back on.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We are glad that you liked it

reviews.review_description: This game really is a simple game. But it is sooo much fun. Ai is competitive but not so hard that you can't win. But you won't always win.  Kind of reminds me of rock n roll racing from super Nintendo days.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback!

reviews.review_description:
Just one thing i wonder if there is a way to disable the boosting of your character when you get behind and just let the players race and catch up on there own

I guess I didn't explain this correctly what I meant is the player when they get so far behind is leaped forward so as to not allow the leader to much of an advantage is there a way to disable this. Love the game by the way.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. Everything is decided by the player
